forest_01_start.title: The Whispering Woods
forest_01_start.text: You wake up at the edge of a dark, whispering forest. Two paths lie before you.

options.text: Take the winding path to the left
Take the winding path to the right

forest_02_river.title: The Riverbank
forest_02_river.text: A rushing river blocks your path.

forest_03_river.title: The Riverbank
forest_03_river.text: A rushing river trails along the forest.

forest_04_hovel.title: The Riverbank
forest_04_hovel.text: Just adjacent to the riverbank is a cute hovel with smoke peacefully leaving its chimney.

chamber_dungeon.title: The Dungeon
chamber_dungeon.text: A Large cavernous dungeon stretches out before you. There is no sign of the sphinx or the woods you were previously in

chamber_treasure.title: The Treasure Trove
chamber_treasure.text: A huge glittering treasure trove of jewels and relics awaits.
